title: melilotus hirsutus
intro: Melilotus hirsutus, also known as hoary melilot or hairy melilot, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly due to its high concentration of coumarin and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. Melilotus hirsutus has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, and is believed to have antioxidant and anti-anxiety properties. In herbal preparations, the flowers, leaves, and roots of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to support overall health and well-being.
